parameters.query:
=WITH applicants AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT u_phone FROM purchase WHERE iid = '{{ $json.iid }}' AND p_cancel_amount = 0
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT u_phone FROM event WHERE iid = '{{ $json.iid }}'
)
SELECT m.u_name, m.u_phone
FROM member m
WHERE m.u_membership_tf = true
  AND m.u_marketing_agree_tf = true
  AND m.u_phone IS NOT NULL
  AND m.u_name NOT ILIKE '%테스트%'
  AND m.u_phone NOT IN (SELECT u_phone FROM applicants WHERE u_phone IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY m.u_name
